recommendations.title: From the Land of the Moon
recommendations.overview: In 1950s France, a free-spirited woman trapped in an arranged marriage falls in love with an injured veteran of the Indochinese War.

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: Lovers
recommendations.overview: Set in Paris the story follows Lisa, who, while on vacation with her husband, rekindles a passionate affair with her ex-boyfriend. But that may lead to a murder.

recommendations.title: Badhaai Ho
recommendations.overview: A 25-year-old man tries to suppress his embarrassment when his mother announces that she is pregnant.

recommendations.title: Slow West
recommendations.overview: In the Old West, a 17-year-old Scottish boy teams up with a mysterious gunman to find the woman with whom he is infatuated.

recommendations.title: The Grand Highway
recommendations.overview: Louis, a nine-year-old boy from Paris, spends his summer vacation in a small town in Brittany. His mother Claire has lodged him with her girlfriend Marcelle and her husband Pelo while she's having her second baby. There Louis makes friends with Marti

recommendations.title: 365 Days
recommendations.overview: A woman falls victim to a dominant mafia boss, who imprisons her and gives her one year to fall in love with him.

recommendations.title: Amor Bandido
recommendations.overview: Joan is a naïve, 16-year-old who falls in love easily. One day he decides to escape to the provinces with Luciana, a beautiful 35-year-old woman and a teacher at his school, in order to give free rein to his love. Soon, Joan discovers with horror tha

recommendations.title: Pretty Persuasion
recommendations.overview: A 15-year-old girl incites chaos among her friends and a media frenzy when she accuses her drama teacher of sexual harassment.

recommendations.title: Embrace of the Vampire
recommendations.overview: An 18-year-old college freshman is seduced by a handsome vampire lover who introduces her to a dark world of carnal desires.
